name: HMS Liberty (J 391)
events: 17 Mar 1945 HMS Unruly (T/Lt. D.J. Palmer, RNVR) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, first with HMS Loch More (Lt.Cdr. R.A.D. Cambridge, DSC, RD, RNR) and HMS Loch Achray (T/A/Lt.Cdr. L.H. Stammers, RNVR) and later with HMS Liberty (T/Cdr. J.S. Roe, DSC, RNVR) and HMS Mounsey (?). (1)
23 Mar 1945 HrMs O 23 (Lt.Cdr. A.J. Schouwenaar, RNN) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory with HMS Liberty (T/Cdr. J.S. Roe, DSC, RNVR) and HMS Loch Achray (T/A/Lt.Cdr. L.H. Stammers, RNVR). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
